autoplay.description: Toggle autoplay mode to automatically play recommended tracks

filter.description: Apply audio filters to the music player

loop.description: Toggle loop mode for the current track

lyrics.description: Search lyrics for the current song or query

options.query: The song to search for (Artist - Title)

move.description: Move a track to a different position in the queue

options.from: The current position of the track
options.to: The new position for the track

remove.description: Remove a track from the queue

options.position: The position of the track in the queue

seek.description: Jump to a specific time in the current track

stop.description: Stop playback and clear the queue

play.noChannel: You must be in a voice channel to use this command.
play.wrongChannel: You must be in the same voice channel as the bot.
play.noResults: No results found for that search.
play.onlyRequester: Only the person who requested this song can favorite it!

controls.noTrack: There is no track playing right now.
controls.autoplayEnabled: Autoplay enabled. Caramel will find similar tracks for you! ✨
controls.favoriteLimit: You can only have up to 10 favorite songs.

lyrics.noResults: Lyrics not found for that song.
lyrics.title: Lyrics for: {{title}}

messages.idle: Nothing played in the last 3 minutes. It's time for me to go.. See ya!
messages.emptyChannel: All users left the voice channel. It's getting cold in here.. I'm out!
messages.kicked: Someone kicked me out the voice chat! I didn't see that coming..

filters.disabled: All audio filters have been disabled.

errors.notEnoughTracksToShuffle: `❌` Not enough tracks in queue to shuffle.
